statement: In every magma, Equation 1696 (`x = (y * x) * ((y * y) * z)`) implies Equation 1387 (`x = y * (((z * z) * y) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0744
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op y y) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z z) y) x))
